acquisition method: designed a Targeted proteomics assay which to the best of our knowledge for very first-time enables identification of peptides from 54 meningioma patients via SRM assay
cleavage agent: 100 μg of protein was digested using Trypsin (Pierce, Thermo Fisher Scientific, United States)
enrichment method: Phosphoproteomics was performed using TiO2 based enrichment approach
instrument: run in the Q-Exactive Orbitrap Mass Spectrometer (Thermo Fisher Scientific, United States)
labeling: mass spectrometry-based label-free quantitative proteome analysis to identifying druggable targets
